selfie_front_cam.name: iPhone Selfie (Front Camera)
selfie_front_cam.description: Classic UGC selfie angle — arm's length, slightly above eye level
prompt_elements: shallow depth of field on background
natural skin rendering, no beauty filter
slight lens flare from overhead light
selfie_front_cam.framing: head and shoulders, product at chest height

rear_cam.name: iPhone Rear Camera (Someone Filming)
rear_cam.description: Higher quality, someone else is filming the creator
prompt_elements: sharper image, more depth of field
slightly more professional but still casual
person aware of camera but not holding it
rear_cam.framing: waist up or full body depending on context

mirror_selfie.name: Mirror Selfie
mirror_selfie.description: Reflected image in bathroom or bedroom mirror
prompt_elements: flash reflection or ambient bathroom lighting
slightly lower quality due to reflection
toothbrush holder, soap dispenser visible in periphery
mirror_selfie.framing: full or three-quarter body in mirror

overhead_flatlay.name: Overhead Flatlay
overhead_flatlay.description: Bird's eye view of products laid out, hands entering frame
